roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DOP/STWPX/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSOCOMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/INTC/SA2:THE AREA BOUNDED BY LARKIN,GEARY, STOCKTON, AND MARKET STS,, SF/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/INTC/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'SOFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:NEAL HALLINAN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) &DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:03-25-22/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SUBMIT TO DRUG TEST WHEN DIRECTED TO DO SO BY SFSO SWORN EMPLOYEE/X:CUFEW, REMAIN CONFINED WITHIN THE INTERIOR PREMISES OF RESIDENCE DURING THE FOLLOWING HOURS: 9 PM - 7 AM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/SA4:AREA BOUNDED BY LARKIN, GEARY, STOCKTON AND MARKET STS, SF/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:DAW IF POSITIVE ACM RPT/DOP/
